title: cyperus stenophyllus
intro: Cyperus stenophyllus, also known as the needle sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Cyperus stenophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its dried roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine to make remedies for various ailments.
